zh.Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可藍布恩 煙雨 阿布利其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lambourne於大約1317年出生在英國英格蘭艾可藍布恩 煙雨 阿布利其時，他的父親William Lambourne28歲，母親Joan Arundell13歲。他與Joanna Lansladrou結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lambourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Lambourn in Berkshire or, less probably, Lambourne in Essex. The Berkshire placename is probably from Old English lamb ‘lamb’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, but the Essex name may alternatively contain Old English lām ‘loam, clay’ as its first element.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lambourne was born about 1317, in Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lambourne, was 28 and his mother, Joan Arundell, was 13. He married Joanna Lansladrou. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England: Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lambourne est né environ 1317, à Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lambourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Arundell, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Lansladrou. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England: Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England, United Kingdom

Er hat Joanna Lansladrou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Lambourne with Abridge, Essex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램우른 위스 아브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lambourne(이)가 대략 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램우른 위스 아브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lambourne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Arundell(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Joanna Lansladrou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 사망했다.
